# Review Response Templates

> Professional templates for responding to Google reviews. Always respond within 24-48 hours.

---

## Golden Rules

1. **Respond to EVERY review** - Good and bad
2. **Respond quickly** - Within 24-48 hours
3. **Be genuine** - Avoid copy-paste feeling
4. **Include keywords** - Naturally mention services/location
5. **Keep it professional** - Even when reviews aren't
6. **Take it offline** - For negative reviews, move to private conversation

---

## 5-Star Review Responses

### Template 1: Simple & Warm
```
Thank you so much for the wonderful review, [Name]! We're thrilled that you had a great experience with [specific service if mentioned]. Your kind words mean a lot to our team. We look forward to serving you again!
```

### Template 2: Highlight Specific Service
```
[Name], thank you for taking the time to leave such a thoughtful review! We're so glad our [service type] team could help with [what they mentioned]. It's customers like you that make what we do so rewarding. See you next time!
```

### Template 3: Emphasize Local Connection
```
Wow, thank you [Name]! We love serving customers here in [City] and your feedback makes our day. We're proud to be your local [business type] and look forward to helping you again soon!
```

### Template 4: Grateful & Brief
```
Thank you for the 5 stars, [Name]! We truly appreciate your business and kind words. See you again soon!
```

### Template 5: Team Recognition
```
[Name], thank you so much! We'll be sure to pass along your kind words to [employee name if mentioned/the team]. We're lucky to have such great customers and team members. Thanks for choosing [Business Name]!
```

---

## 4-Star Review Responses

### Template 1: Appreciate & Inquire
```
Thank you for the great review, [Name]! We're happy you had a positive experience. If there's anything we could have done to earn that fifth star, we'd love to hear about it. Feel free to reach out to us at [email/phone]. Thanks again!
```

### Template 2: Focus on Positive
```
Thanks for the 4-star review, [Name]! We're glad you enjoyed [positive thing they mentioned]. We're always looking to improve, so please don't hesitate to share any feedback. We hope to see you again soon!
```

### Template 3: Simple Acknowledgment
```
Thank you for the review, [Name]! We appreciate your business and feedback. We're always striving for 5-star experiences, so let us know if there's anything we can do better next time!
```

---

## 3-Star Review Responses

### Template 1: Apologize & Engage
```
Thank you for your honest feedback, [Name]. We're glad [positive aspect if any], but sorry we didn't exceed your expectations. We'd love the chance to make it right. Could you reach out to us at [email/phone]? We take all feedback seriously and want to do better.
```

### Template 2: Acknowledge & Improve
```
Hi [Name], thank you for taking the time to share your experience. We're sorry it wasn't a 5-star visit. Your feedback helps us improve. If you're open to it, please contact us at [email/phone] so we can learn more about what happened and how we can do better.
```

### Template 3: Short & Open
```
Thanks for your feedback, [Name]. We appreciate hearing about your experience and would love the opportunity to do better. Please feel free to contact us at [email/phone] to discuss further.
```

---

## 2-Star Review Responses

### Template 1: Concerned & Solution-Focused
```
[Name], we're really sorry to hear about your experience. This isn't the standard we strive for at [Business Name]. We'd like to understand what happened and make it right. Could you please contact us at [email/phone]? We take this feedback very seriously.
```

### Template 2: Empathetic
```
Hi [Name], thank you for letting us know about your experience. We're disappointed we didn't meet your expectations and sincerely apologize for [specific issue if mentioned]. Please reach out to [Name] at [email/phone] so we can address this personally.
```

### Template 3: Direct Acknowledgment
```
We appreciate you sharing this, [Name], and we're sorry your experience didn't meet the standard we aim for. Your feedback is important to us. Please contact us at [email/phone] so we can discuss how to make this right.
```

---

## 1-Star Review Responses

### Template 1: Apologetic & Action-Oriented
```
[Name], we're truly sorry to hear about your experience. This is not acceptable and doesn't reflect our values at [Business Name]. We want to make this right immediately. Please contact [Owner/Manager Name] directly at [email/phone] so we can resolve this for you.
```

### Template 2: Take Responsibility
```
We sincerely apologize, [Name]. We clearly fell short of providing the experience you deserved. We've taken your feedback to heart and are addressing this internally. Please reach out to us at [email/phone] - we'd like the opportunity to make this right.
```

### Template 3: Concerned Owner Response
```
Hi [Name], I'm [Your Name], the owner of [Business Name], and I'm personally sorry to read about your experience. This is not the level of service we pride ourselves on. I would really appreciate the chance to speak with you. Please call or email me directly at [phone/email]. I want to understand what happened and make it right.
```

### Template 4: When Review Seems Unfair (Still Professional)
```
Thank you for your feedback, [Name]. We take all reviews seriously and want to understand what happened. We don't have a record of [specific detail if review seems incorrect], but we'd like to learn more. Please contact us at [email/phone] so we can investigate and address your concerns.
```

---

## Handling Specific Situations

### Review Mentions Employee by Name (Positive)
```
Thank you so much, [Name]! We'll be sure to let [Employee] know about your kind words - they'll be thrilled! We're proud of our team and grateful to have customers like you. See you next time!
```

### Review Mentions Employee by Name (Negative)
```
[Name], we're sorry your experience didn't meet expectations. We take customer service very seriously and will be addressing this internally. Please contact us at [email/phone] so we can discuss this further and make it right.
```

### Review About Wait Time/Delays
```
Hi [Name], we apologize for the longer wait time during your visit. We know your time is valuable. We're working to improve our efficiency, and we appreciate your patience and feedback. We hope to provide a quicker experience next time!
```

### Review About Pricing
```
Thank you for your feedback, [Name]. We understand value is important. Our pricing reflects [quality of materials/expertise/service level]. We'd be happy to discuss our services and options with you. Please feel free to reach out at [phone/email].
```

### Fake or Spam Review
```
We don't have any record of this visit or customer in our system. If this is a genuine experience, please contact us at [email/phone] with your details so we can investigate. We take all feedback seriously and want to address any real concerns.
```

*Note: Also flag fake reviews to Google for removal through your GBP dashboard.*

### Competitor Review (Suspected)
```
Thank you for the feedback. We don't have a record of this transaction. If you did visit us, please contact us at [email/phone] with more details so we can look into this. We're always happy to address genuine customer concerns.
```

---

## Response Writing Tips

### Do's ✅
- Use the reviewer's name
- Thank them for taking time to write
- Acknowledge specific points they made
- Keep responses concise (50-150 words)
- Include a call to action when appropriate
- Show personality that matches your brand
- Use keywords naturally (service type, location)

### Don'ts ❌
- Never argue or get defensive
- Don't make excuses
- Avoid generic copy-paste responses
- Never reveal private information
- Don't blame the customer
- Never ignore negative reviews
- Don't promise things you can't deliver

### Keywords to Include Naturally
- Business name
- Location/city
- Service type
- Team/staff references

**Example:**
> "Thank you for choosing **Smith's Plumbing** for your **water heater installation** here in **Austin**. Our **team** loves serving customers like you!"

---

## Review Monitoring Checklist

### Daily
- [ ] Check for new reviews (Google, Yelp, Facebook)
- [ ] Respond to all reviews within 24 hours
- [ ] Flag any fake/spam reviews

### Weekly
- [ ] Review response quality check
- [ ] Note any recurring issues mentioned
- [ ] Update templates if needed

### Monthly
- [ ] Analyze review trends
- [ ] Report to client
- [ ] Adjust service based on feedback

---

## Quick Reference Card

| Star Rating | Tone | Response Time | Length |
|-------------|------|---------------|--------|
| 5 ⭐ | Grateful, warm | Within 24 hrs | 30-50 words |
| 4 ⭐ | Appreciative, curious | Within 24 hrs | 40-60 words |
| 3 ⭐ | Understanding, helpful | Within 12 hrs | 50-80 words |
| 2 ⭐ | Concerned, solution-focused | Within 6 hrs | 60-100 words |
| 1 ⭐ | Apologetic, urgent | Within 2 hrs | 80-120 words |
